result:
Build is fully green — all three binaries built successfully with no errors (only one pre-existing, unrelated warning in `wpa_cli.c`).

Fixed 5 bugs:
1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (field doesn't exist on `struct os_reltime`)
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (undeclared function)
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `pairwise_cipher` (no such struct member)
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `current_ssid` (no such struct member)
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout(...)` missing the trailing `NULL` user_data argument
